title: Barcode Tool
description: An internal barcode scanning and processing utility built to streamline inventory management, item lookup, and data entry workflows.

milestones.title: Identified manual data entry pain points
milestones.description: We mapped repetitive barcode scanning tasks and multi-step data entry workflows that caused delays in operations.

milestones.title: Built a fast scan-to-record pipeline
milestones.description: The tool reduced manual entry overhead by automating the capture, validation, and routing of barcode data directly into operational systems.

obstacles.challenge: Manual barcode entry was error-prone and slowed throughput.
obstacles.solution: We built an automated scanning pipeline that removed human error and increased processing speed.

title: Delivery Dashboard
description: A command-center dashboard for delivery monitoring, scheduling, payroll visibility, SmartStop integration, and operational access control.

milestones.title: Mapped the operational bottlenecks
milestones.description: We studied dispatch workflows, monitoring gaps, payroll visibility issues, and repetitive manual processes before writing the first feature.

milestones.title: Built role-based dashboards
milestones.description: The platform centralized scheduling, weekly summaries, access controls, and business-critical utilities into a single operational system.

obstacles.challenge: Operations data was fragmented across tools and manual routines.
obstacles.solution: We unified core actions into one dashboard experience with clear role-aware access and reporting.

title: Routing Assistant
description: A route-preparation utility that converts exported manifests into formats compatible with third-party navigation apps such as RoadWarrior and Circuit.

milestones.title: Standardized manifest processing
milestones.description: We normalized source data so teams could reliably transform outbound manifests into upload-ready route files.

milestones.title: Reduced route planning friction
milestones.description: The tool removed repetitive prep work and helped save over 300 hours per week in route planning effort.

obstacles.challenge: Manifest formats were inconsistent and painful to prepare manually.
obstacles.solution: We built a transformation workflow that automated formatting and reduced human error.

title: SmartStop
description: A HERE Maps-backed web application that helps delivery teams gain secure access to gated communities and reduce failed deliveries.

milestones.title: Integrated location intelligence
milestones.description: We combined mapping, access data, and delivery context into a single workflow for field teams.

obstacles.challenge: Missed deliveries were often caused by gated-access delays.
obstacles.solution: We designed a system that gave drivers better information and a faster path to successful completion.

title: Rokit Online v3
description: A motion-rich, editorial-style web platform designed to showcase services, featured work, brand trust, and high-conversion user journeys.

milestones.title: Established an editorial visual language
milestones.description: We leaned into strong typography, layered sections, and elevated motion to increase perceived quality and brand authority.

milestones.title: Built conversion-focused page flows
milestones.description: Gallery, services, CTA bands, and trust sections were arranged to move users toward quotes, orders, and portfolio exploration.

obstacles.challenge: The experience needed to feel bold and modern without becoming visually heavy.
obstacles.solution: We used light backgrounds, restrained color accents, and subtle layered motion to keep the interface premium and breathable.

title: Paris Beauty & Hair Studio
description: A salon website experience with appointment booking, payment integration, and customer-facing presentation tailored for smoother operations and better conversion.
